what_it_does: Defines a moved HTML page that immediately redirects to /, shows fallback redirect text with a gallery link, applies shared CSS variables, and mounts the Vee dock component.
observations: A comment states the standalone token playground has been merged into the gallery and now lives in a Tokens drawer on index.html.
Redirect behavior is implemented with both a meta refresh and location.replace('/').
The fallback body is centered full-viewport text styled with system fonts and shared CSS variables.
The page links /surface/styles/vars.css and injects palette CSS variables from /surface/components/vee/palette.js.
The Vee dock is mounted from /surface/components/vee/vee-dock.js even on the redirect page.
standouts: This file is a redirect shell rather than a token-editing surface.
The fallback message preserves a navigable link to the gallery.
The persistent Vee dock setup remains embedded on the page.
conventions: Uses absolute root paths for redirects, links, styles, and module imports.
Uses inline CSS for the small fallback layout.
Uses an inline module script to initialize shared page chrome.
Combines declarative HTML redirect with imperative JavaScript redirect.
concerns: The immediate JavaScript redirect means the fallback content and Vee dock are unlikely to be seen in normal browser execution.
The root-relative redirect assumes / is the intended gallery location in every deployment context.
notes: This is a compatibility redirect page for the former token playground route.
questions: Should the redirect target always be /, or should it point to a specific gallery route or drawer state?
Is the Vee dock intentionally initialized on a page that redirects immediately?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the implementation: the file says the token playground moved and the page redirects to the gallery.
intention_signals: It appears intended to preserve the old tokens.html entry point while sending users to the consolidated gallery experience.
novelty: A redirect-only page still initializes the shared Vee dock and palette styling before navigation.
contribution: Contributes a lightweight route-preservation layer, fallback user-facing copy, and continued inclusion of shared visual shell behavior for the moved token playground path.
summary_for_embedding: app/tokens.html is a moved-page HTML redirect from the former token playground to /, with fallback copy, shared token styling, and Vee dock initialization.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for keeping the old token playground URL usable after token editing moved into the gallery.
